meaning: n.图西人(卢旺达与布隆迪境内的少数民族人)
examples: Now, officially, no one is a Hutu or Tutsi; there are only Rwandans.
The Tutsi have different greetings for morning, afternoon, and evening.
That show of concern has seemed enough to halt, perhaps only briefly, the advance of the Tutsi rebels.
Fearing reprisal, thousands of Congolese Tutsis have fled across the nearby border into Tutsi-run Rwanda.
The enemy - the Rwandan Patriotic Front or RPF - had been formed among Tutsi exiles in Uganda.
